title: Putility Service Framework

classes.name: BasicBase
classes.notes: Root base. Walks prototype chain to merge static FEATURES/IMPLEMENTS/PROPERTIES/MODULES/TOPICS/HOOKS arrays and objects across inheritance.

classes.name: FeatureBase
classes.constructor: constructor(parameters, ...a): loads merged FEATURES[], calls feature.install_in_instance(this, {parameters}) for each
classes.notes: Core DI mechanism: iterates FEATURES[] and installs each feature into the instance. Sets this._ = { features }

classes.name: AdvancedBase
classes.notes: Main base class for all backend services. Bundles 4 core features. Traits depend on ./bases + ./traits; AdvancedBase sits above both.

classes.name: ServiceManager
classes.constructor: constructor({ context }): sets this.context, initializes services_l_[], services_m_{}, service_infos_{}, init_listeners_[], waiting_{}
methods: async register(name, factory, options): factory.create({parameters, context}) → maybe_init_(name)
get(name): returns instance if status===Running, else undefined
async aget(name): waits for init then returns instance
async wait_for_init(depends[]): polls via init_listeners_ callbacks until all deps Running
get_waiting_for_(depends[]): returns subset of deps not yet Running
async maybe_init_(name): checks deps via get_waiting_for_; if clear → init_service_, else marks Pending + registers in waiting_{}
async init_service_(name, modifiers): sets Initializing → calls as(TService).init() → sets Running → recursively maybe_init_ dependents → fires init_listeners_
classes.notes: Orchestrates dependency-ordered service initialization. Uses TService trait on each service instance.

classes.name: Service
methods: static create({ parameters, context }): new this() → ins._.context = context → as(TService).construct(parameters) → return ins
__get_event_handler(id): returns this[`__on_${id}`] or static handler or NOOP

trait_impl_TService.init: runs _.init_hooks[], then calls this._init(...a) if present
trait_impl_TService.construct: copies params to this.$parameters, calls this._construct(o) if present
trait_impl_TService.get_depends: returns [...DEPENDS, ...get_depends()] array of service name strings

classes.notes: Abstract base for all concrete services. TService trait bridges ServiceManager lifecycle into subclass hooks.

features.name: TraitsFeature
features.source_static: IMPLEMENTS{} — keyed by Symbol or string; iterates inheritance chain merging bound methods
features.notes: Foundation for all trait dispatch. Must be installed before features that call instance.mixin().

features.name: NodeModuleDIFeature
installs: instance.modules{} — merged MODULES static, overridable via parameters.modules
instance.require(name) — returns injected mock or real require

features.name: PropertiesFeature
installs: reactive getters/setters via Object.defineProperty for each key in PROPERTIES
features.source_static: PROPERTIES{} — each value: { factory?, adapt?, post_set?, construct? }
features.notes: Supports construction-time wiring (construct key), value adaptation, and post-set hooks.

features.name: TopicsFeature
features.source_static: TOPICS[] — list of topic name strings
features.notes: Pub/sub for intra-instance topics. Calls instance.mixin(TTopics, ...) — requires TraitsFeature installed first.

features.name: ServiceFeature
installs: Deferred hooks: after service init, subscribes to other services' TTopics events
features.source_static: HOOKS[] — each entry: { service: string, event: string, do: Function }
features.notes: Wires cross-service event subscriptions declaratively at init time via _.init_hooks[].

features.name: EmitterFeature
installs: instance.emit(key, data, meta) → Promise (concurrent listeners, dot-path wildcards)
features.notes: Simpler opt-in alternative to TopicsFeature. Not included in AdvancedBase.FEATURES by default.

static_contracts.FEATURES: Array of feature objects (install_in_instance) — inherited + merged by FeatureBase
static_contracts.IMPLEMENTS: Object keyed by Symbol/string → trait method map — processed by TraitsFeature
static_contracts.PROPERTIES: Object keyed by name → property spec — processed by PropertiesFeature
static_contracts.MODULES: Object keyed by module name → default impl — processed by NodeModuleDIFeature
static_contracts.TOPICS: Array of topic name strings — processed by TopicsFeature
static_contracts.HOOKS: Array of {service, event, do} — processed by ServiceFeature
static_contracts.DEPENDS: Array of service name strings — read by TService.get_depends()

key_relationships: Service implements TService (via IMPLEMENTS static + TraitsFeature)
FeatureBase composes Features (installs NodeModuleDIFeature, PropertiesFeature, TraitsFeature, TopicsFeature)
TopicsFeature produces TTopics mixin on instance
ServiceFeature consumes TTopics on dependency service instances
TraitsFeature enables instance.as() / instance.mixin() — prerequisite for TopicsFeature and ServiceFeature
service_lifecycle: 4a. No pending deps → init_service_(): status=Initializing → TService.init() → _init() → status=Running
4b. Pending deps → status=Pending, added to waiting_[dep]
5. After a dep reaches Running → recursively maybe_init_ all waiting dependents
6. init_listeners_ callbacks fired → aget() waiters resolve
